'''âk-ng-k-zh''' ('''kakangkezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outbuy|outbuy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-k-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outbuy|outbuy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-ng-k-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kakangkezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikangkezhoko|thikangkezhoko]] || [[word:jikangkezhoko|jikangkezhoko]] || [[word:shikangkezhoko|shikangkezhoko]] || [[word:kikangkezhoko|kikangkezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokangkezhoko|thokangkezhoko]] || [[word:jokangkezhoko|jokangkezhoko]] || [[word:shokangkezhoko|shokangkezhoko]] || [[word:kokangkezhoko|kokangkezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
